description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1) operating in autonomous mode turned right onto Laguna Street from eastbound Hermann Street, approaching the
 intersection with Market Street in San Francisco. As it was entering the intersection, the Zoox vehicle briefly braked to a stop, and just as it 
started to move, it was rear ended by a passenger car (Vehicle 2) traveling directly behind. The Zoox vehicle operator then disengaged from 
autonomy, cleared the intersection, and pulled over to exchange information. The rear bumper of the Zoox vehicle sustained minor damage, 
and its software operator, who was seated in the front passenger seat, reported "soreness in [the] right shoulder" after the collision. The 
police were not called
Print
Clear Form
